current_life_events: Just after a ten-year breakup, the user has started a demanding new role as a Project Manager, facing tight deadlines and the emotional fallout from the ended relationship.
mental_state: Emotionally drained and struggling to focus, the user feels overwhelmed by the new responsibilities and the recent loss.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The combination of a sudden breakup and the pressures of a new role has triggered procrastination and work stress, making the user feel stuck and prompting them to reach out.
